# MOON Naturally Yours
> Premium single-origin Kashmiri wellness products — Shilajit, Saffron, Honey, Dry Fruits, and Ghee. Sourced directly from farmers in Jammu & Kashmir, India. Ships across India. Contact: hello@moonnaturallyyours.com

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/): Premium Kashmiri wellness storefront with 7 single-origin products.
- [About](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/about): Brand story, founder background from Baramulla, and sourcing philosophy from Kashmir Valley.
- [FAQs](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/faqs): 15 detailed answers on product authenticity, quality testing, storage, delivery, and returns.
- [Journal](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/journal): Educational articles on Kashmiri saffron, Himalayan Shilajit, raw honey, walnuts, and ghee.

## Products
- [Himalayan Shilajit](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/products/shilajit): Gold grade resin from Zanskar Ridge above 16,000 ft. 70%+ fulvic acid, 84+ trace minerals. Third-party lab tested. ₹1,999.
- [Kashmiri Saffron (Mongra A++)](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/products/kashmiri-saffron): ISO Grade 1, hand-harvested from Pampore — India's only GI-tagged saffron region. Deep red stigmas, no yellow style. ₹1,250.
- [Kashmiri Honey](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/products/kashmiri-honey): Raw, unfiltered, cold-extracted from high-altitude deodar forests in Pahalgam. Enzyme-rich, naturally crystallising. ₹1,150.
- [Irani Saffron (Negin Grade)](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/products/irani-saffron): Whole Negin-grade Iranian saffron threads. Balanced flavour for everyday use. ₹1,050.
- [Kashmiri Almonds](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/products/kashmiri-almonds): Premium whole kernels from Kashmir valley orchards. Unroasted, unsalted, rich in vitamin E. ₹899.
- [Kashmiri Walnuts](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/products/kashmiri-walnuts): Fresh-crop orchard select walnuts. High in omega-3 fatty acids. ₹950.
- [Kashmiri Ghee](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/products/kashmiri-ghee): Small-batch bilona-method clarified butter. Traditional A2 preparation. ₹1,350.

## Journal Articles
- [Kashmir's Red Gold: The Complete Guide to Genuine Saffron](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/journal/kashmirs-red-gold-guide-to-genuine-saffron): How to identify genuine Kashmiri saffron vs imitations — ISO grades, home tests, health benefits, storage.
- [Shilajit: The Himalayan Mountain Resin That Ancient Healers Swore By](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/journal/shilajit-himalayan-resin-ancient-healer): What modern science says about Shilajit — fulvic acid, minerals, clinical studies, Ayurvedic use.
- [From Hive to Table: The Untold Story of Raw Kashmiri Honey](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/journal/raw-kashmiri-honey-hive-to-table): Traditional beekeeping in Pahalgam, cold extraction methods, why raw honey crystallises.
- [Why Kashmiri Walnuts Are in a League of Their Own](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/journal/kashmiri-walnuts-superfood-from-the-valley): Thin-shell Kashmiri walnuts vs standard varieties — omega-3 content, harvest, nutrition.
- [The Ancient Art of Kashmiri Ghee: How MOON Makes It Differently](https://www.moonnaturallyyours.com/journal/moon-kashmiri-ghee-artisan-process): Bilona process explained, A2 fat structure, butyric acid, traditional preparation methods.

## Key Facts
- Founded: Kanispora, Baramulla, Jammu & Kashmir — 193101, India
- All products: single-origin, traceable to named farms or regions
- Testing: ISO 3632 (saffron), fulvic acid + heavy metals (shilajit), pollen analysis + moisture (honey)
- Delivery: 2–7 business days across India (standard); express 2–3 days select pin codes
- Payment: UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), cards, net banking, Cash on Delivery
- Contact: hello@moonnaturallyyours.com | WhatsApp: +91-6005099213
- Not for: international shipping (India only currently)
